sections.paragraph:
Original: זהב

Transliteration: zâhâb

Phonetic: zaw-hawb'

BDB Definition:

  1. gold
    1. as precious metal
    2. as a measure of weight
    3. of brilliance, splendour (figuratively)

Origin: from an unused root meaning to shimmer

TWOT entry: 529a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
